mapper.sql: id, subject, sendTime, expectSendTime, sendFlag, createBy, createTime, content, tos, ccs, bccs, actualSendAddress, attachFiles, isInner, failedCount
mapper.insert: insert into t_mails (id, subject, sendTime, expectSendTime, sendFlag, createBy, createTime, content, tos, ccs, bccs, actualSendAddress, attachFiles, isInner, failedCount) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expectSendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sendFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{tos,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{ccs,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{bccs,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{actualSendAddress,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{attachFiles,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{isInner,jdbcType=BIT}), #{failedCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}

insert into t_mails
id,
subject,
sendTime,
expectSendTime,
sendFlag,
createBy,
createTime,
content,
tos,
ccs,
bccs,
actualSendAddress,
attachFiles,
isInner,
failedCount,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{expectSendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{sendFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{tos,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{ccs,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{bccs,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{actualSendAddress,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{attachFiles,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{isInner,jdbcType=BIT},
#{failedCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update t_mails
subject = #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sendTime = #{sendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expectSendTime = #{expectSendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sendFlag = #{sendFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
tos = #{tos,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
ccs = #{ccs,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
bccs = #{bccs,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
actualSendAddress = #{actualSendAddress,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
attachFiles = #{attachFiles,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
isInner = #{isInner,jdbcType=BIT},
failedCount = #{failedCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_mails set subject = #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sendTime = #{sendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, expectSendTime = #{expectSendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sendFlag = #{sendFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, tos = #{tos,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, ccs = #{ccs,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, bccs = #{bccs,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, actualSendAddress = #{actualSendAddress,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, attachFiles = #{attachFiles,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, isInner = #{isInner,jdbcType=BIT}, failedCount = #{failedCount,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from t_mails
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
subject = #{model.subject, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isInner = #{model.isInner, jdbcType=BIT} AND
sendTime = #{model.sendTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
expectSendTime = #{model.expectSendTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
sendFlag = #{model.sendFlag, jdbcType=BIT} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
content = #{model.content, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
tos = #{model.tos, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
ccs = #{model.ccs, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
bccs = #{model.bccs, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
actualSendAddress = #{model.actualSendAddress, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
attachFiles = #{model.attachFiles, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
failedCount = #{model.failedCount, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( subject like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or content like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or tos like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ccs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or bccs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or actualSendAddress like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or attachFiles like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from t_mails
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
subject = #{model.subject, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isInner = #{model.isInner, jdbcType=BIT} AND
sendTime = #{model.sendTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
expectSendTime = #{model.expectSendTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
sendFlag = #{model.sendFlag, jdbcType=BIT} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
content = #{model.content, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
tos = #{model.tos, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
ccs = #{model.ccs, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
bccs = #{model.bccs, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
actualSendAddress = #{model.actualSendAddress, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
attachFiles = #{model.attachFiles, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
failedCount = #{model.failedCount, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( subject like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or content like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or tos like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ccs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or bccs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or actualSendAddress like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or attachFiles like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

SELECT * from t_notify_template where templateCode = #{templateCode}
and effectiveFrom < now() and (effectiveTo is null or effectiveTo > now())

select * from t_mails where sendFlag = false and expectSendTime < now()
and failedCount < #{_parameter}
mapper.update:
update t_mails set sendFlag = true, sendTime = now()
where FIND_IN_SET(id, #{_parameter})
update t_mails set failedCount = failedCount + 1 where FIND_IN_SET(id, #{_parameter})
